title: Primary happy path
verified_behaviors: Binds RP00.P02.M03.S07 to Hermes Validation Primary happy path
Accepts only S06 allow_metadata_only Hermes Validation Audit hint precheck results
Requires a carried audit hint and audit_event_ref before emitting metadata-only happy path receipt references
Allows Matter-scoped and firm-level control-plane metadata happy path receipts

Rejects missing S06 result, wrong entrypoint, wrong S06 marker, denied audit hint, unsatisfied audit_event_ref, missing audit hint, service execution, runtime route, product write, tenant lifecycle mutation, Hermes execution/evidence creation, audit ledger append, audit event write, runtime permission evaluation, permission engine, AuthZ evaluator, permission audit bypass, audit hint bypass, requirement trace bypass, human approval bypass, Hermes gate bypass, Claude review bypass, real-data, and unknown happy path claims fail-closed
Carries validation context ids, TEN-001 through TEN-008 trace refs, acceptance gates, M00 refs, permission_decision_ref, audit_event_ref, and S02/S03/S04/S05/S06 refs
Does not append audit ledgers or write audit events
Does not create runtime routes or execute service logic
Does not mutate tenant lifecycle state
Does not run Hermes validation or create Hermes evidence as product runtime behavior
Does not evaluate runtime permissions, call AuthZ, or run a permission engine
Does not replace human approval, H00, or C00
Does not use real data or write product state
Hands off to RP00.P02.M03.S08 Secondary workflow path
human_acceptance_or_explicit_next_goal_b: No human approval is required for this deterministic synthetic metadata-only control-plane subphase; explicit next boundary is RP00.P02.M03.S08 Secondary workflow path.
